## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
